queries.query: CREATE TABLE d_m${localChannelId} ( ID BIGINT NOT NULL, SERVER_ID CHARACTER VARYING(36) NOT NULL, RECEIVED_DATE TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, PROCESSED BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, ORIGINAL_ID BIGINT, IMPORT_ID BIGINT, IMPORT_CHANNEL_ID CHARACTER VARYING(36), CONSTRAINT d_m${localChannelId}_PKEY PRIMARY KEY(ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE INDEX d_m${localChannelId}_INDEX1 ON d_m${localChannelId}(ID, SERVER_ID)

CREATE TABLE d_mm${localChannelId} ( ID INTEGER NOT NULL, MESSAGE_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, SERVER_ID CHARACTER VARYING(36) NOT NULL, RECEIVED_DATE TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, STATUS CHARACTER(1) NOT NULL, CONNECTOR_NAME LONGTEXT, SEND_ATTEMPTS INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, SEND_DATE TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, RESPONSE_DATE TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, ERROR_CODE INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, CHAIN_ID INTEGER NOT NULL, ORDER_ID INTEGER NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT d_mm${localChannelId}_PKEY PRIMARY KEY(MESSAGE_ID, ID), CONSTRAINT d_mm${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID) REFERENCES d_m${localChannelId}(ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE INDEX d_mm${localChannelId}_INDEX1 ON d_mm${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID, ID, STATUS)
CREATE INDEX d_mm${localChannelId}_INDEX2 ON d_mm${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID, SERVER_ID, ID)
CREATE INDEX d_mm${localChannelId}_INDEX3 ON d_mm${localChannelId}(ID, STATUS, SERVER_ID)
CREATE INDEX d_mm${localChannelId}_FKI ON d_mm${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID)

CREATE TABLE d_mc${localChannelId} ( METADATA_ID INTEGER NOT NULL, MESSAGE_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, CONTENT_TYPE INTEGER NOT NULL, CONTENT LONGTEXT, IS_ENCRYPTED BOOLEAN NOT NULL, DATA_TYPE CHARACTER VARYING(255), CONSTRAINT d_mc${localChannelId}_PKEY PRIMARY KEY(MESSAGE_ID, METADATA_ID, CONTENT_TYPE), CONSTRAINT d_mc${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID, METADATA_ID) REFERENCES d_mm${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID, ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE INDEX d_mc${localChannelId}_FKI ON d_mc${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID, METADATA_ID)

CREATE TABLE d_ma${localChannelId} ( ID CHARACTER VARYING(255) NOT NULL, MESSAGE_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, TYPE CHARACTER VARYING(40), SEGMENT_ID INTEGER NOT NULL, ATTACHMENT_SIZE INTEGER NOT NULL, CONTENT LONGBLOB, ENCRYPTION_HEADER LONGTEXT, CONSTRAINT d_ma${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID) REFERENCES d_m${localChannelId}(ID) ON DELETE CASCADE ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE INDEX d_ma${localChannelId}_INDEX1 ON d_ma${localChannelId}(ID)
CREATE INDEX d_ma${localChannelId}_FKI ON d_ma${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID)

CREATE TABLE d_ms${localChannelId} ( METADATA_ID INTEGER, SERVER_ID CHARACTER VARYING(36) NOT NULL, RECEIVED BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, RECEIVED_LIFETIME BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, FILTERED BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, FILTERED_LIFETIME BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, SENT BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, SENT_LIFETIME BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ERROR BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ERROR_LIFETIME BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 ) ENGINE=InnoDB;
CREATE INDEX d_ms${localChannelId}_INDEX1 ON d_ms${localChannelId}(METADATA_ID, SERVER_ID)
INSERT INTO d_msq${localChannelId} VALUES (1)

CREATE TABLE d_channels ( LOCAL_CHANNEL_ID BIGINT NOT NULL, CHANNEL_ID CHARACTER VARYING(36) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT d_channels_PKEY PRIMARY KEY(LOCAL_CHANNEL_ID), CONSTRAINT UNIQUE_CHANNEL_ID UNIQUE (CHANNEL_ID) ) ENGINE=InnoDB
DROP TABLE d_m${localChannelId}
DROP TABLE d_mm${localChannelId}
DROP TABLE d_mc${localChannelId}
DROP TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId}
DROP TABLE d_ma${localChannelId}
DROP TABLE d_ms${localChannelId}
DROP TABLE d_msq${localChannelId}
DELETE FROM d_channels WHERE LOCAL_CHANNEL_ID = ${localChannelId}
ALTER TABLE d_mm${localChannelId} DROP FOREIGN KEY d_mm${localChannelId}_FKEY
ALTER TABLE d_mm${localChannelId} ADD CONSTRAINT d_mm${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID) REFERENCES d_m${localChannelId}(ID) ON DELETE CASCADE
ALTER TABLE d_ma${localChannelId} DROP FOREIGN KEY d_ma${localChannelId}_FKEY
ALTER TABLE d_ma${localChannelId} ADD CONSTRAINT d_ma${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID) REFERENCES d_m${localChannelId}(ID) ON DELETE CASCADE
ALTER TABLE d_mc${localChannelId} DROP FOREIGN KEY d_mc${localChannelId}_FKEY
ALTER TABLE d_mc${localChannelId} ADD CONSTRAINT d_mc${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID, METADATA_ID) REFERENCES d_mm${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID, ID) ON DELETE CASCADE
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} DROP FOREIGN KEY d_mcm${localChannelId}_FKEY
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} ADD CONSTRAINT d_mcm${localChannelId}_FKEY FOREIGN KEY(MESSAGE_ID, METADATA_ID) REFERENCES d_mm${localChannelId}(MESSAGE_ID, ID) ON DELETE CASCADE
TRUNCATE TABLE d_m${localChannelId}
TRUNCATE TABLE d_mm${localChannelId}
TRUNCATE TABLE d_mc${localChannelId}
TRUNCATE TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId}
TRUNCATE TABLE d_ma${localChannelId}
UPDATE d_msq${localChannelId} SET ID = ID + 1
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} ADD COLUMN `${columnName}` VARCHAR(255);
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} ADD COLUMN `${columnName}` DECIMAL(31, 15);
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} ADD COLUMN `${columnName}` BIT;
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} ADD COLUMN `${columnName}` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL;
ALTER TABLE d_mcm${localChannelId} DROP COLUMN `${columnName}`

SELECT ID, NAME, SUBSTRING(CHANNEL.CHANNEL, LOCATE ('<port>', CHANNEL.CHANNEL )+6, (LOCATE ('</port>', CHANNEL.CHANNEL) - LOCATE ('<port>', CHANNEL.CHANNEL)) - 6) AS PORTSTRING FROM CHANNEL WHERE CHANNEL.CHANNEL LIKE '%<listenerConnectorProperties%';
